doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_add1sp2n (mpfr/src/add1sp.c L482-L611): same-precision same-sign addition fast path for p == 2*GMP_NUMB_BITS (= 128 on x86_64), i.e. two-limb mantissas with sh == 0 (no sub-limb padding). The dispatcher routes here AFTER add1sp2's prec check (L1488-L1491). Same bigint extended-precision strategy as add1sp2: order operands, compute S = (large.mant << d) + small.mant exactly, round via roundMantissa.
c_signature: static int mpfr_add1sp2n(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, mpfr_srcptr c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
divergence_from_c: Same as add1sp2: 2-limb decomposition collapsed to single bigint; static linkage dropped; Result return shape.
refs: mpfr/src/add1sp.c L482-L611 — verbatim C reference body.
